ground_truth.title: Bold Music Reviews | What Our Family Has to Say
ground_truth.main_content: Parent Approved. Amy Yancey testimonial: "I think Fred is gifted, super patient, and a talented musician. He has a plan for our boys. When he comes each day, he's great. Overall, the experience has been wonderful. Really." Bold Music Student & Parent. Featured in: Charlotte Agenda, Charlotte5, Charlotte Magazine, Charlotte Observer, Charlotte Parent, RAL Today, Raleigh Magazine. What Parents Are Saying: Customer reviews praising Bold Music for in-home lessons, professional instructors, community events, and performance opportunities. Review highlights include convenience of home lessons, excellent teachers like Fred, Payton, Mars, and Ashley, supportive community environment, Gig Night performances, and positive impact on children and adult students. Rosa Schiano: "George and his Bold music team have been around for a long time, and they all work as a family to provide great inspiration to all age students thru music skills and learning instruments." Stacie Z.: "We initially chose Bold Music for the convenience of having an instructor come to our home, but we continued to choose Bold year after year for the professional yet personal experience." Molly Goldberg: "My 7 year old daughter and I have taken beginner piano lessons for 2 years now with Ms. Ashley and it's been a wonderful experience!" Ready to Get Started With Personalized Music Lessons?
with: I think Fred is gifted, super patient, and a talented musician. He has a plan for our boys.
George and his Bold music team have been around for a long time, and they all work as a family to provide great inspiration to all age students.
We initially chose Bold Music for the convenience of having an instructor come to our home, but we continued to choose Bold year after year for the professional yet personal experience.
My 7 year old daughter and I have taken beginner piano lessons for 2 years now with Ms. Ashley and it's been a wonderful experience!
Bold Music is the premier music lesson organization in the greater Charlotte area.
